# reconcile-web

> Read-only FastHTML viewer serving an accountant the monthly bank statements and receipts
> from the private reconcile-archive repo, behind a single shared password. Also the user's
> educational project for learning FastHTML + nbdev, with design/plan records and kata notes.

<!-- BEGIN AUTO -->
## Files

- [README.md](README.md): nbdev-generated readme: install, env config (ARCHIVE_DIR/APP_PASSWORD/SESSION_SECRET), run commands
- [docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-02-reconcile-web-design.md](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-02-reconcile-web-design.md): Approved v1 design: deterministic thin viewer over the status.md contract, security invariants, auth
- [docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-reconcile-web-v1.md](docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-02-reconcile-web-v1.md): Task-by-task TDD implementation plan for v1: two nbdev notebooks, auth gate, routes, tests
- [nbs/2026-07-18-index-table-kata.md](nbs/2026-07-18-index-table-kata.md): FastHTML lessons from the index-table kata: FT escaping, route identity, kernel state, CSS, TestClient
- [nbs/2026-07-19-month-expand-kata.md](nbs/2026-07-19-month-expand-kata.md): HTMX lessons from the month-expand kata: OOB id matching, idempotent placeholder swaps, HX-Request
<!-- END AUTO -->
